subject: docs(todo): move HISTORY.md removal to each repo's TODO section
body:
Replaced the single USER_ACTIONS.md entry with a per-repo HISTORY.md
Remove subsection in the gap matrix TODO. Each of the 10 downstream
repos now has the same 5-step checklist under its section:
delete docs/HISTORY.md, remove CLAUDE.md section, update wording,
remove from README, and delete stale [x] items.

For model-pear and graphiki, the checklist specifically flags their
known completed-but-not-moved TODO items to delete.

Also cleaned up a stale EVENT_BUS decide leftover from repo-tor's
prior cleanup.

Tags: documentation, cleanup, cross-project
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: docs-simplification
Semver: patch
